developments.description: Research only new developments since last run
developments.prompt_modifier: Only include developments, news, and changes since the last run. Focus on what changed.

gaps.description: Explore one unexplored subtopic from the gaps list
gaps.prompt_modifier: Pick one unexplored subtopic and research it in depth. Provide new insights and data not covered before.

factcheck.description: Verify and update existing facts, confidence scores, and sources
factcheck.prompt_modifier: Review existing facts, update confidence scores, and identify contradictions from newer or stronger sources.
